display_text: Undying Aghanim's Scepter: Increases strength steal from Decay. This upgrade amplifies Undying's role as a tanky disabler, countering strength-dependent heroes by reducing their durability and boosting his own survivability in prolonged fights.
search_text: Undying Aghanim Scepter strength steal tanky disabler counter-strength heroes

display_text: Undying Aghanim's Shard: Allows Tombstone to be cast on an allied hero, providing a bunkering mechanic. This counters burst damage and dive-heavy lineups by offering temporary invulnerability and forcing enemies to deal with the Tombstone's zone control before finishing kills.
search_text: Undying Aghanim Shard Tombstone bunker anti-burst anti-dive zone control
